steps.description: Press key: F1 to open the command palette in Visual Studio Code, within the "Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit" extension interface.
Type text into the Visual Studio Code Command Palette: 'Microsoft 365 Agents:Validate Application'.
Press the "Enter" key to execute the command "Microsoft 365 Agents:Validate Application" in the Visual Studio Code command palette.
Click on the "Validate app manifest schema" option within the dropdown menu of the "Select a validation method" dialog in Visual Studio Code.
Click on the "manifest.json" file path displayed in the "Select Teams manifest.json File" dialog within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension for Visual Studio Code.
Click the "dev" option in the dropdown menu within the "Select an environment" prompt in Visual Studio Code.
